info.title: MSC Event Backend API
info.description: All endpoints return JSON errors in the shape { ok:false, code, message, details? }. CORS is enabled for admin/public endpoints, including OPTIONS preflight with Access-Control-Allow-Methods GET,POST,PATCH,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS and Access-Control-Max-Age 600.

409.description: Conflict (code: EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE_ACTIVE_ENTRY, BACKUP_ENTRY_INVALID_LINK, REGISTRATION_NOT_OPEN, REGISTRATION_CLOSED, EVENT_NOT_OPEN)

value.message: Image upload invalid or not finalized

fieldErrors.message: Image upload is invalid or not finalized

value.message: Image upload invalid or not finalized

fieldErrors.message: Image upload is invalid or not finalized

get.description: Dashboard counters are based on active (non-deleted) entries for the selected event.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity (code: ATTACHMENT_NOT_ALLOWED_FOR_PROCESS, ATTACHMENT_UPLOAD_NOT_FOUND, ATTACHMENT_UPLOAD_NOT_FINALIZED, ATTACHMENT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, ATTACHMENT_FILE_TOO_LARGE, ATTACHMENT_TOTAL_SIZE_EXCEEDED, ATTACHMENT_INVALID_CONTENT_TYPE, MISSING_REQUIRED_PLACEHOLDERS)

attachmentUploadIds.description: Optional finalized upload IDs for PDF attachments (campaign templates only). Max 3 files.

post.description: Process-only endpoint. Campaign templates are not allowed. preselection is intentionally blocked and returns TEMPLATE_NOT_ALLOWED_IN_PROCESS.

value.message: Template is not allowed in process endpoint

eventType.description: Lifecycle process event. preselection is currently blocked and returns TEMPLATE_NOT_ALLOWED_IN_PROCESS.

includeDriverNote.description: If true, include driver note block for accepted_open_payment/rejected mails when a note exists.

post.description: Queues a deterministic payment reminder quick action for a single entry. With allowDuplicate=true, duplicate checks are bypassed and each call enqueues a new outbox item. Queued reminders are visible via GET /admin/mail/outbox for the same eventId and processed by the same dispatcher/retry pipeline as other outbox mails.

templateId.description: Optional alternative template key. Defaults to payment_reminder when omitted.

allowDuplicate.description: Force resend mode. If true, duplicate-skip is bypassed and a new outbox record is created on each call.

reason.description: Present when queued=0, for example duplicate, not_allowed, no_recipient.

get.description: Lists active (non-deleted) entries. createdAt is immutable (creation timestamp), updatedAt is last modification timestamp. q supports multi-token AND search across firstName, lastName, full name, email and startNumber. For sortBy=createdAt, sortDir=desc this endpoint is deterministic; ties are resolved by id with the same sort direction.

delete.description: Soft-deletes an entry. Supports optional deleteReason in request body. Idempotent for already-deleted entries.

patch.description: Updates acceptance status. For acceptanceStatus=shortlist no lifecycle mail is sent, even when sendLifecycleMail=true. Optional includeDriverNoteInLifecycleMail controls whether driverNote is included for accepted_open_payment/rejected mails.
Confirms payment on entry level. Invoice may be created transparently if missing.
Manually adjusts entry payment totals/paid amounts. Works without pre-existing invoice; backend handles internal ledger/invoice creation as needed.
Saves entry notes only. Does not trigger acceptance status transitions or lifecycle/outbox mail actions.
Changes the class for one entry based on classId. Vehicle type mismatch is not a hard blocker; vehicle type can be aligned to target class type and optionally mirrored to a linked backup entry.

get.description: Lists templates with delivery scope metadata and composer contract. Frontend should build the editor from composer.fields and renderOptions (including includeEntryContext default).

post.description: Uses the same rendering pipeline as actual send. htmlDocument is final send-ready HTML. Preview and send use the same templateData + renderOptions contract. Precedence: if bodyOverride/bodyHtmlOverride is set (draft mode), structured composer sections are not auto-rendered.

get.description: Driver recipient lookup for campaign UI. Requires Authorization header. On errors, always returns JSON ApiError with CORS headers.

post.description: Recipient union preview for campaign send. Union semantics: recipients = (filter matches) U (driverPersonIds) U (entryIds) U (additionalEmails), minus invalid and duplicates. Uses the same dedupe semantics as /admin/mail/send.

Campaign endpoint only. Allowed template keys: newsletter, event_update, free_form, payment_reminder_followup. Union semantics: recipients = (filter matches) U (driverPersonIds) U (entryIds) U (additionalEmails), minus invalid and duplicates.

attachmentUploadIds.description: Optional finalized upload IDs for PDF attachments (campaign templates only). Max 3 files.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity (code: TEMPLATE_NOT_ALLOWED_IN_CAMPAIGN, ATTACHMENT_NOT_ALLOWED_FOR_PROCESS, ATTACHMENT_UPLOAD_NOT_FOUND, ATTACHMENT_UPLOAD_NOT_FINALIZED, ATTACHMENT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, ATTACHMENT_FILE_TOO_LARGE, ATTACHMENT_TOTAL_SIZE_EXCEEDED, ATTACHMENT_INVALID_CONTENT_TYPE, MISSING_REQUIRED_PLACEHOLDERS)

value.message: Template is not allowed in campaign endpoint

imageUploadId.description: Upload id returned by /public/uploads/vehicle-image/finalize. Direct imageS3Key input is not accepted.

guardianConsentAccepted.description: Muss true sein, wenn Fahrer unter 18 ist.

vehicleThumbUrl.description: Absolute short-lived presigned URL for vehicle thumbnail.

backupVehicleThumbUrl.description: Absolute short-lived presigned URL for backup vehicle thumbnail.

vehicleThumbUrl.description: Absolute short-lived presigned URL for vehicle thumbnail.

createdAt.description: Immutable creation timestamp in ISO-8601 with timezone (UTC).

updatedAt.description: Last modification timestamp in ISO-8601 with timezone (UTC).

examples.label: Erinnerung E-Mail-Bestätigung
examples.subject: Erinnerung: E-Mail bestätigen - {{eventName}}
examples.bodyText: Hallo {{driverName}}, bitte bestätige deine E-Mail-Adresse über {{verificationUrl}}.

examples.label: Beifahrer-Information
examples.subject: Info: Du wurdest als Beifahrer eingetragen - {{eventName}}
examples.bodyText: Hallo {{codriverName}}, {{driverName}} hat dich als Beifahrer eingetragen.

attachmentUploadIds.description: Optional finalized upload IDs for PDF attachments (campaign templates only). Max 3 files.

examples.bodyTextRendered:
Hallo Max Mustermann

wir haben deine Anmeldung erhalten.

Verifizierung: https://example.org/verify?token=abc123

warnings: verificationUrl fehlt; CTA und Verifizierungslink können nicht gerendert werden.
